subtitle: Senior Digital Solutions Leader -- AI Guidance | BI & Analytics | Enterprise SDLC
summary_text: Technology executive and delivery leader with 28 years building custom digital solutions and leading technical teams across consulting and enterprise environments. Founded and ran a web development consultancy for 17 years, delivering custom solutions and proprietary CMS infrastructure for dozens of clients. Then directed a 35+ person technology organization for 14 years as the first CTO in a 45-year-old enterprise -- full SDLC ownership, BI/analytics maturation including production ML, and Azure cloud migration. Currently consulting on AI architecture evaluation: scoring rubrics, capability taxonomies, and platform decisions for enterprise contact center environments. Comfortable across client-facing delivery, executive stakeholder engagement, and the practical translation between business outcomes and technical decisions.

bullets: Designed scoring rubric, evaluation flow, and AI capability taxonomy for a national CX consulting firm -- adopted to streamline vendor recommendations across enterprise contact center platforms including NICE and Genesys-tier solutions.

Deliver AI-centric guidance to executive stakeholders on generative and agentic AI architectures; designed a structured, repeatable methodology for comparing AI platforms against enterprise requirements.

Engineered algorithmic evaluation frameworks to assess AI software platforms for enterprise contact center use cases, mapping capabilities to specific technologies with relative strengths and integration compatibility.

Led enterprise-wide contact center AI transformation -- intelligent call routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live of full platform replacement.

Owned product roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development) across 12+ executive stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% year-over-year.

Delivered BI and analytics maturation using DataRobot, Power BI, and SQL-based data warehousing; transitioned the organization from reactive reporting to predictive ML models in production for credit and servicing use cases.
Directed full Azure cloud migration across all enterprise workloads; maintained 100% PCI-DSS certification over multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance across all 50 states.
Created Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated enterprise project governance across IT and non-IT functions -- delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence.

Led digital transformation driving 200%+ increase in SEO and digital acquisition; rebuilt web properties, launched multi-platform mobile applications, and embedded integrated analytics across operations.
Advanced through progressive leadership roles: Front-End Technologist / DBA / SQL Architect, IT Manager, VP of IT, and first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history.
Founded and scaled a web development and IT consulting firm over 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients including commercial-grade CMS platforms.
Architected a proprietary content management platform that supported dozens of content-driven client websites, frequently serving as clients' first digital presence.
Built multiple independent revenue streams including custom web application development, hosting services, and digital optimization -- each delivering consistent year-over-year growth.

skills.items: Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture, LLM Platforms, AI Platform Evaluation
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
DataRobot, Power BI, Tableau, SQL, T-SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Data Warehousing
Python, JavaScript, Angular, React, HTML/CSS, Full SDLC, Agile/SAFe
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, GRC, Multi-State Regulatory Compliance
ServiceNow, JIRA, Microsoft 365, Sitecore, Custom ERP/CRM Platforms
